extensionDescription.message: Kukonza kwa akatswiri a Chiarabu typography pa tsamba lililonse. Imakonza mipata ya zilembo, imalowetsa zilembo zokongola za Chiarabu, ndikukonza zovuta zowonetsera zomwe zimayambitsa malemba achiarabu olekanitsidwa.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Yambitsani kapena zimitsani extension ya Arabic Type

letterSpacingNote.message: Mpata wa zilembo umakhazikitsidwa nthawi zonse kukhala 0 kuti upewe kulekanitsidwa kwa zilembo zachiarabu. Ichi ndi chifukwa chofala kwambiri cha chiwonetsero cha Chiarabu chosweka pa intaneti.

forceRTLDescription.message: Imakakamiza mayendedwe akumanja-kupita-kumanzere pa midadada ya malemba achiarabu. Yambitsani kwa mawebusaiti omwe Chiarabu chimawoneka molakwika kumanzere-kupita-kumanja.

diacriticsDescription.message: Imakulitsa chiwonetsero cha zilembo za mavawelo (tashkeel) kuti ziletse kudulidwa pamwamba ndi pansi pa mzere wa malemba.

siteFontOverrideLabel.message: Gwiritsani ntchito kalembedwe kosiyana patsamba ili

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: Sankhani kalembedwe kosiyana patsamba ili lokha, kupyolera kusankha kwanu kwa kalembedwe kwapadziko lonse.

fontSourceNote.message: Zilembo zimaperekedwa ndi Google Fonts. Zimafunikira kulumikizidwa kwa intaneti pakuyamba kwenikweni.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Mapempha a kalembedwe amatumizidwa ku maseva a Google. Onani fonts.google.com/privacy.

statusGlobalMode.message: Kugwiritsa ntchito global mode — zikhazikiko za lang/dir zapezeka.
